assertions.assertion: Includes an ITestClaimsProvider (or equivalent) interface that allows setting claims per-test
assertions.rationale: ITestClaimsProvider interface defined with SetClaims, ClearClaims, and GetClaims methods

assertions.assertion: The WebApplicationFactory registers the test auth scheme via AddAuthentication and AddScheme
Shows a test that calls ClearClaims (or equivalent) and asserts 401 Unauthorized
Does NOT disable authorization entirely — authorization policies remain active
assertions.rationale: Only authentication is replaced; authorization policies (AdminOnly, ApiScope) remain active. Explicitly noted in the response.
